hook_text: Oman HR managers waste 11 hours per month on one task that should take 11 minutes.
body:
We surveyed 47 Omani HR professionals earlier this year.

The #1 time sink: WPS file preparation and submission.

Average time spent per month: 11.3 hours.

What that looks like:
- Exporting from payroll system
- Reformatting for Ministry specs
- Fixing rejection errors (avg 2.1 per submission)
- Re-uploading and waiting for confirmation
- Updating records manually

The Ministry's portal hasn't changed its format requirements in 4 years.

The average Omani HR manager earns OMR 650/month.

11.3 hours x OMR 650 / 176 working hours = OMR 41.75 wasted every single month.

Across a 50-person company: that's just one HR person's time.
Across a 300-person company running 3 entities: multiply by 3.

OMR 125+ per month. Every month. Just to reformat a file.

SmartPRO Hub generates Ministry-compliant WPS files in under 60 seconds.

---

Is your team still reformatting? Tell me what's broken in the process — I read every comment.
cta: DM "WPS" for a free audit of your current process.
